verdict: B. Needs tool functionality upgrade first
actual_tool_functionality: Uses user topic, content type, strategy, and count; generates customized grouped tags through shared discovery logic. However groups are generic Broad/Niche/Long-Tail/Community/Content-Type/Low-Competition and do not yet reflect YouTube-specific upload tag behavior, misspellings, title/thumbnail/description alignment, or primary vs supporting tag priority.
premium_ux: Readable grouped chips with copy buttons and clear output note. Avoids bulk dump behavior reasonably well, but lacks a YouTube-specific review panel, avoid list, primary/supporting split, and explanation per suggested tag.
seo_content_quality: Description, FAQs, disclaimer, and no-guarantee language are strong and intent-matched. Below-tool content is mostly generic shared tool content plus FAQs, not yet a premium YouTube tagging guide.
risk_policy_status: Passes non-affiliation, no ranking/views/recommendation guarantees, anti-spam guidance, and AdSense/AdX-safe wording.
specific_missing_premium_features: No primary/secondary/misspelling tag sections; no per-tag rationale; no avoid/unsupported tags panel; no title/description/thumbnail consistency checklist; shared generic group labels reduce premium feel.
specific_content_improvements_needed: Add a short YouTube-specific usage section explaining tags vs title/description, relevance checks, alternate spellings, and why not to stuff unrelated terms.
exact_upgrade_tasks: Replace shared tag groups with YouTube-specific groups: Primary Topic Tags, Supporting Context Tags, Alternate/Misspelling Tags, Audience/Format Tags, Avoid/Review Notes. Add per-tag reason text and a final checklist tied to title thumbnail description and spoken content.

verdict: B. Needs tool functionality upgrade first
actual_tool_functionality: Uses product description, tag strategy, tag count, and long-tail option; outputs customized grouped tags. But the engine is shared and not Etsy-specific enough: it does not enforce Etsy tag length, does not separate material/style/occasion/buyer intent cleanly, and does not explain which product attribute supports each tag.
premium_ux: Chip groups and copy buttons are usable. The UX is scannable, but it feels like a generic tag generator with Etsy wording rather than a premium marketplace listing helper. No listing audit, no unsupported-claim warning card tied to generated tags, no 13-tag final set quality check.
seo_content_quality: SEO copy, FAQs, and disclaimer are strong. Helpful Content is good on safety, but below-tool content could better teach truthful Etsy tag construction and marketplace-specific constraints.
risk_policy_status: Passes non-affiliation, no sales/ranking/traffic/approval guarantees, anti-stuffing guidance, and ad-safe wording.
specific_missing_premium_features: No Etsy 13-tag final set optimizer; no tag length/attribute constraints; no material/style/occasion/persona grouping based on selected strategy; no per-tag rationale; no warning when generated tags imply handmade/vintage/personalized claims.
specific_content_improvements_needed: Add Etsy-specific guidance on truthful attributes, 13-tag limits, materials, occasion, recipient, style, and unsupported handmade/vintage/local claims.
exact_upgrade_tasks: Upgrade output to include Final 13 Tags, Attribute Tags, Occasion/Recipient Tags, Style/Material Tags, Long-Tail Phrases, Do-Not-Use Notes, and a listing-consistency checklist for title photos description category materials and shipping.

verdict: B. Needs tool functionality upgrade first
actual_tool_functionality: Uses topic, pin intent, keyword strategy, and count; produces customized grouped keyword tags. Still relies on generic shared discovery groups and does not deeply model Pinterest pin title, board, image, destination page, seasonal intent, shopping vs informational intent, or visual search context.
premium_ux: Output is easy to scan with copyable chips and a strong safety note. It avoids pure bulk dumping, but lacks pin-specific sections such as pin title keywords, board keywords, destination-page checks, seasonal qualifiers, and avoid notes.
seo_content_quality: Metadata, FAQs, and disclaimer are strong. Below-tool content remains mostly generic except FAQs; it needs a richer Pinterest-specific mini-guide to be premium Helpful Content.
risk_policy_status: Passes non-affiliation, no traffic/ranking/saves/click guarantees, anti-spam guidance, and AdSense/AdX-safe wording.
specific_missing_premium_features: No pin-title vs board vs destination-page grouping; no visual/image relevance notes; no seasonal/shopping/informational branch logic beyond generic content type; no per-keyword rationale; no final pin usage checklist.
specific_content_improvements_needed: Add content explaining how Pinterest keywords should map to image, title, board, description, and destination page, plus when to use seasonal and shopping terms.
exact_upgrade_tasks: Upgrade output to include Pin Title Keywords, Board/Topic Keywords, Description Phrases, Destination Page Match, Seasonal/Intent Tags, Avoid/Review Notes, and rationale for each group.

verdict: B. Needs tool functionality upgrade first
actual_tool_functionality: Uses user topic and groups tags by Genre, Mood, Instrument, Vibe, and Niche/Community. This is more platform-specific than the shared engine, but many outputs are static generic music tags and do not use selected style to generate deeply customized track metadata. No tempo, vocal/instrumental, subgenre, mix type, or release-context controls.
premium_ux: Readable grouped output with copyable chips and a clear safety note. Feels useful but still lightweight; it lacks track profile fields, per-tag rationale, avoid notes for misleading genre tags, and a concise final recommended tag set.
seo_content_quality: FAQs/disclaimer are strong and safe. Helpful Content is decent, but below-tool content needs more music-tagging specificity around genre accuracy, subgenre honesty, remixes, samples, credits, and rights.
risk_policy_status: Passes non-affiliation, no plays/discovery/ranking/repost/follower guarantees, anti-spam guidance, and AdSense/AdX-safe wording.
specific_missing_premium_features: No track-type controls; no final selected tag set; no tempo/BPM/mood/instrument/genre relationship notes; no remix/sample/original-track safety panel; limited customization beyond base topic.
specific_content_improvements_needed: Add SoundCloud-specific guidance on genre honesty, mood tags, instrumental/vocal context, remixes/samples, credits, and avoiding famous-artist or misleading community tags.
exact_upgrade_tasks: Add controls for track type, genre family, mood, vocal/instrumental, and release context. Upgrade output to Final Tags, Genre/Subgenre Tags, Mood/Energy Tags, Instrument/Production Tags, Community Tags, Avoid/Review Notes, and per-group rationale.
